name: Mandala Bloom
description: Radial expansion architecture mapping octahedral symmetry to 8 petals with topological attention. Each petal corresponds to an O_h vertex state, with Golden Ratio spacing between bloom layers. Topological protection through winding number invariants preserves charge under deformation. Vortex memory anchors position at write-time.

core_attributes.pattern: radial expansion, 8-petal octahedral mapping, topological attention, vortex memory
